name: Unusual Lemon Tart
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Fat (1 oz lard and 1 oz margarine)
4 tbsp Water to mix (more may be required)
1 large Cooking Apple, peeled and grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the pastry and line a 7-inch flan ring.
2. Combine the grated apple, sugar, lemon zest, and juice in a bowl.
3. Beat the egg and stir it into the fruit mixture.
4. Place the filling in the tart case and bake at 350°F (170°C) for 25 - 40 minutes.
